_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: the complex detected with HSBXB by IF clearly dissipated in the treated cells compared with the untreated cells, while the total BCL-XL signal was unaffected
details: Treatment with BCL-XL:BIM-disrupting BH3-mimetic A1155463 caused HSBXB complex signal to clearly dissipate while total BCL-XL signal was unaffected
